headline: A Look At ON Semiconductor (ON) Valuation After A Strong Multi Month Share Price Run
summary: Recent share performance and business profile ON Semiconductor (ON) has drawn investor attention after a strong recent run, with the share price at $103.03 and total returns of 66% over the past month and 72% over the past 3 months. The US based chip maker focuses on intelligent sensing and power solutions, reporting US$5.99b in revenue and US$121.0m in net income. Its operations span power, analog and mixed signal, and intelligent sensing segments. See our latest analysis for ON...
